title: RainBeThunder
body:
## RainBeThunder

RainBeThunder is a simple mod that turns your rain into thunder 100% of the time (as is tested)! This is the vanilla thunder so all mods and vanilla mechanics should work with this mod!

![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/89364072/170896347-e4d0b17e-b397-4eaf-a2db-5ee2ed7b8954.gif)
